description: Argentine banking primitives (CBU/CVU + bank lookup) and BCRA Central de Deudores adapter as drop-in tools for the Vercel AI SDK.

tools.name: get_bcra_variable
tools.description: Fetch the historical series of a BCRA indicator (serie histórica de una variable del BCRA) by id. USE THIS WHEN: the user wants historical values of a specific variable (cotización USD, CER, UVA, infl

tools.name: get_cer
tools.description: Get the current CER coefficient (coeficiente CER hoy, ajuste por inflación; BCRA variable id 30). CER is the official inflation-tracking coefficient used to adjust regulated debt and contracts. USE TH

tools.name: get_reservas_bcra
tools.description: Get BCRA international reserves (reservas del BCRA, Reservas Internacionales; variable id 1). USE THIS WHEN: the user asks about reservas, USD reserves, or BCRA balance sheet. Returns the latest value

tools.name: get_usd_oficial
tools.description: Get the official USD exchange rate (dólar oficial, a cuánto está el dólar, cotización USD; Tipo de Cambio Minorista, BCRA variable id 4). Returns the current value + date + the most recent N daily dat

tools.name: get_uva
tools.description: Get the current UVA value (valor UVA hoy; Unidad de Valor Adquisitivo, BCRA variable id 31). UVA is the inflation-adjusted unit used for AR mortgages, fixed-term deposits, and rentals. USE THIS WHEN:

tools.name: list_banks
tools.description: List Argentine banks (listar bancos argentinos) with their BCRA codes. USE THIS WHEN: you need to render a dropdown of banks for the user to pick from, or need to enumerate available entities for a wo

tools.name: list_bcra_variables
tools.description: List BCRA monetary indicators (principales variables del BCRA) with their current latest value and ID. Returns variables like Reservas Internacionales, Tipo de Cambio Minorista USD, Tipo de Cambio May

tools.name: list_psps
tools.description: List Argentine fintech wallets / PSPs (listar billeteras virtuales, Mercado Pago, Ualá, Naranja X, Personal Pay, etc.) with their CVU prefixes. USE THIS WHEN: you need to render a dropdown of fintech

tools.name: lookup_bank_by_code

tools.name: lookup_credit_situation

tools.name: validate_cbu
